example_tasks: Set up guest network for visitors

Audit connected devices on the wireless network

reasoning: The icon combines a Wi-Fi signal with a gear, clearly representing wireless network configuration, setup, or troubleshooting. It is highly specific and useful for distinguishing network-related IT tasks from general tasks.
